expectations.evidence: The without_skill run was instructed not to read the reference document. The review uses non-standard KWCAG item numbering (e.g., '7.1.1 키보드 사용 보장', '7.3.1 마크업 오류 방지', '7.1.2 초점 이동과 표시') rather than the sequential 1-33 numbering defined in kwcag22.md. These '7.x.x' numbers do not match the actual KWCAG2.2 specification.

The review header states '대상 파일: features/web-sample/components/Card.tsx'. All 6 findings reference Card.tsx with specific details about the div onClick pattern, id='card-item', and handleClick function.

expectations.text: Identifies concrete issues (e.g., missing alt text, keyboard accessibility)
expectations.evidence: Identifies 6 concrete issues: (1) keyboard inaccessibility of div onClick, (2) missing role attribute, (3) duplicate id='card-item', (4) no focus indicator styles, (5) missing accessible name, (6) direct DOM manipulation in handleClick. Each includes specific code references and explanations.

expectations.text: Maps each issue to specific KWCAG item ID
expectations.evidence: Issues are mapped to incorrect KWCAG identifiers. Uses '7.1.1', '7.3.1', '7.1.2' which are not valid KWCAG2.2 item IDs. The actual KWCAG2.2 uses sequential numbering 1-33 (e.g., Item 10 for keyboard access, Item 32 for markup errors). Without reading the reference document, the mapping is inaccurate.

expectations.text: Provides fix recommendations for each issue
expectations.evidence: Each of the 6 issues includes a '해결 방안' section with code examples: tabIndex + onKeyDown handler, role='button', useId() for unique IDs, focus:outline CSS classes, aria-labelledby pattern, and React useState recommendation. Recommendations are practical and actionable.
